statement: In every magma, Equation 2376 (`x = (y * (z * (x * w))) * x`) implies Equation 307 (`x * x = x * (x * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0818
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op x w))) x)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op x (op x x))
